custom_nodes.author: KATO Kanryu
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Text-Driven Workflows
custom_nodes.description: A smart ComfyUI extension that simplifies text-driven workflows. Systematically organize, aggregate, and switch prompts or character settings with a single click, and batch process multiple staging plans simultaneously.

custom_nodes.author: cyberdelia
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-cyberdelia-z-engineer
custom_nodes.description: LLM-powered prompt engineering node for Z-Image Turbo workflows. By Cyberdelia AI Lab.

custom_nodes.author: goodguy1963
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Auto Watermark Mask
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom nodes for automatic watermark masking and direct removal with OpenCV, EasyOCR, and Big-LaMa.

custom_nodes.author: stevelasmin4real
custom_nodes.title: Auto Switch (ANY) by Steve Lasmin
custom_nodes.description: Auto Switch (ANY) by Steve Lasmin — A ComfyUI custom node for automatic signal routing between two universal inputs.

custom_nodes.author: dreamrec
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Pixal3D
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI wrapper for [a/Pixal3D](https://github.com/TencentARC/Pixal3D) — Tencent's SIGGRAPH 2026 single-image to PBR-textured-3D pipeline. Windows + NVIDIA RTX 30/40/50 (≥ 16 GB VRAM). One image → textured PBR mesh in ~3-5 min. Built on top of [a/ComfyUI-Trellis2](https://github.com/visualbruno/ComfyUI-Trellis2). Note: Pixal3D itself is academic / non-commercial only and NOT for EU use — see NOTICE.md.

custom_nodes.author: PlagueKind
custom_nodes.title: PlagueKind-Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Custom ComfyUI nodes providing unified image and mask resizing with multiple scaling modes, aspect-ratio preservation, center crop alignment, and stable tensor-based mask transformations.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: Model and Prompt from Metadata
custom_nodes.description: Drop a ComfyUI PNG/WebP/JSON onto the node to instantly extract and apply checkpoint, VAE, and prompts from embedded metadata. Supports ComfyUI, SD WebUI, SD Forge neo, Fooocus, SDXLPromptStyler, and Lora Loader (LoraManager). Includes LoRA from Metadata and CLIP Text Encode edit+ nodes.

custom_nodes.author: Magos Digital Studio
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Magos-Nodes
custom_nodes.description: DWPose & NLF skeleton editor, retargeter, and renderer for ComfyUI. Extract body/hand/face keypoints (+ optional NLF 3D) from video, edit them frame-by-frame in a full-screen timeline + dope sheet + graph + 3D orbit editor with animated camera, retarget DWPose proportions per-cluster, and render clean pose images. Outputs standard ComfyUI types — drives WanAnimate, ControlNet, SCAIL, LTX-Video, UniAnimate, and any other pose-driven pipeline.

custom_nodes.author: Anonymzx
custom_nodes.title: BangtrixToolkit
custom_nodes.description: Advanced ComfyUI toolkit with translation, AMD ROCm utilities, optimization, and workflow enhance

custom_nodes.author: pmarmotte2
custom_nodes.title: Comfyui-Pick_Any
custom_nodes.description: Advanced chooser nodes for ComfyUI that let workflows pause for image, audio, or text selection, with optional automatic picking and series helper nodes.

custom_nodes.author: WJLUOXIAO
custom_nodes.title: XB_ToolBox
custom_nodes.description: A comprehensive ComfyUI extension suite encompassing both front-end interaction and low-level memory scheduling, designed to help beginners master workflows and simplify local deployment.

custom_nodes.author: PaoloC68
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-PuLID-Flux-Chroma
custom_nodes.description: The first PuLID (face identity preservation) implementation with full Chroma model support for ComfyUI. Automatically detects and adapts to both FLUX and Chroma models. Fork of PuLID-Flux-Enhanced with comprehensive Chroma compatibility fixes.

custom_nodes.author: flrngel
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_rgbx_xrgb_Wrapper
custom_nodes.description:
This is the rgb2x and x2rgb wrapper node for ComfyUI. The required models are automatically downloaded on the first run.
original project : [a/https://github.com/zheng95z/rgbx](original project : https://github.com/zheng95z/rgbx)

custom_nodes.author: nicehero
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Conditioning Saver
custom_nodes.description: Save and load CONDITIONING tensors to or from files, enabling reuse of encoded prompts and caching expensive CLIP encodings across workflows.

custom_nodes.author: randyhaylor
custom_nodes.title: Unified Conditioning Merge (with timestep ranges)
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node: range-aware Concat/Combine/Average for CONDITIONING that correctly carries start_percent/end_percent across both inputs. Single unified node with mode dropdown, dynamic 1..N input slots, per-slot weights, and timestep-range intersection.

custom_nodes.author: COkedat
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-prompt-append
custom_nodes.description: A custom node for ComfyUI that provides advanced, condition-based prompt appending allowing you to dynamically build prompts based on the presence or absence of specific tags.

custom_nodes.author: maweiqiang1978
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-AIB
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI plugin providing a toolbox of features, including automatic generation of double eyelid position masks. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: GeekatplayStudio
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-HiddenImages
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom-node pack and installer for hidden-image workflows across SD 1.5, SDXL, and FLUX with pattern preprocessing, text-mask generation, and workflow blueprints.

custom_nodes.author: BitPoet
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-bitpoet-keywordsize
custom_nodes.description: Simple ComfyUI node that determines the image size by a keyword in the prompt, optionally replacing the keyword

custom_nodes.author: marduk191
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-fp8_cublas
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node that patches loaded models (Flux, SDXL, etc.) to run Linear layers in FP8 or MXFP8, unlocking tensor-core throughput on Ada Lovelace (RTX 4090) and Blackwell (RTX 5090) GPUs.

custom_nodes.author: knishika62
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_AITuber
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node that automatically generates image generation prompts using AITuber persona dataset (195 characters). Uses LLM to generate prompts based on character index and atmosphere keywords. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: marduk191
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-voxtral
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom nodes for Mistral's Voxtral TTS

custom_nodes.author: siw6819
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-case-insensitive-dropdowns
custom_nodes.description: Fixes ComfyUI's case-sensitive dropdown sorting so all combo widgets sort A→Z, case-insensitively.

custom_nodes.author: clybius
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Chroma-RoPE
custom_nodes.description: Advanced RoPE modifications for Chroma/FLUX models including DyPE, YaRN, and other RoPE extension methods.

custom_nodes.author: nynxz
custom_nodes.title: AsymFLUX2
custom_nodes.description: Native ComfyUI v3 nodes for the pixel-space AsymFLUX.2-klein 9B model from LakonLab (Asymmetric Flow Models, arXiv 2605.12964).

custom_nodes.author: bbc-s
custom_nodes.title: Float Increment Per Latent
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node for sweeping LoRA model strength per latent sample in a single batch.

custom_nodes.author: hybskgks28275
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Anima-NAG
custom_nodes.description: Experimental Normalized Attention Guidance node for Anima Preview 3 in ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: Aiconomist
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-rekogniflow
custom_nodes.description: AWS Rekognition nodes for ComfyUI — compare faces, score image quality, and automatically pick the best image from a batch.

custom_nodes.author: bemoregt
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_Cross-Bi-Magnitude
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node package that aligns and stitches two images using Cross-Bimagnitude, the magnitude component of the Cross-Bispectrum from Higher-Order Statistics (HOS).

custom_nodes.author: SmokingDormouse
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Qwen3VL-NightShift
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node for multimodal inference with Qwen3VL vision-language models accepting text, up to 4 images, and video in one node.

custom_nodes.author: wdewr4t
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-WatermarkNode
custom_nodes.description: Quickly add watermarks to pictures with batch processing, greatly improving work efficiency for bulk watermarking tasks. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: LahHalah
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Pixel-Optimal-Wan
custom_nodes.description: Pixel optimization tools for ComfyUI image processing. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: afloy011-spec
custom_nodes.title: afloy_audio_tools
custom_nodes.description: Professional audio editing nodes for ComfyUI — trim, measure, and inspect audio without leaving your workflow.

custom_nodes.author: Pixalai
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-audio-trimmer
custom_nodes.description: Audio trimmer with visual Premiere Pro-style timeline for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: matoo
custom_nodes.title: Compare Frames
custom_nodes.description: Interactive A/B frame comparison node with slider, side-by-side, overlay, and video playback — directly inside ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: mancusog
custom_nodes.title: Detail Stitch
custom_nodes.description: Crop and paste nodes with metadata for detail stitching in ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: axior
custom_nodes.title: DOGMA Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Custom ComfyUI nodes for DOGMA AI video workflows.

custom_nodes.author: orpheus-gaze
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-S2Guidance
custom_nodes.description: A lightweight ComfyUI extension implementing S²-Guidance and Perpo-Guidance, two advanced sampling techniques designed to improve prompt adherence and generation robustness compared to standard CFG.

custom_nodes.author: stevelasmin4real
custom_nodes.title: RAM/VRAM Purge by Steve Lasmin
custom_nodes.description: Aggressive RAM and VRAM cleanup nodes for ComfyUI on Windows. Clears model caches, CLIP, checkpoints, VAE, and forces Windows to release physical RAM.

custom_nodes.author: pozzettiandrea
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-TurntableGSViewer
custom_nodes.description: Tiny Gaussian Splat turntable viewer node for ComfyUI.

custom_nodes.author: rheemai24-hue
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-SDCPP
custom_nodes.description: A custom node for ComfyUI that integrates the powerful stable-diffusion.cpp inference engine.

custom_nodes.author: xelavi9966-cell
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-LineSignalRouter
custom_nodes.description: A custom ComfyUI node for routing signals through named lines, supporting up to 32 lines with single-line or multi-line mode and per-line enable/disable toggle.

custom_nodes.author: bemoregt
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_PhaseStretchTransform
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that applies the Phase Stretch Transform (PST) to images. PST is a physics-inspired edge detection algorithm that enhances features by simulating wave propagation through a dispersive medium.

custom_nodes.author: sequencer-media
custom_nodes.title: Sequencer AI Nodes
custom_nodes.description: One universal node for all 50+ Sequencer AI models. Generate images, videos, and audio (Veo 3.1, Flux 1.1 Pro, Kling, Ideogram, etc). dynamically populates model lists and I/O sockets.

custom_nodes.author: AabhasTech
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Fast Preview
custom_nodes.description: A lightweight node to compress and preview images using the temp directory, displaying file sizes on the node UI.

custom_nodes.author: KingManiya
custom_nodes.title: LLM Text Processor
custom_nodes.description: Process text and images with GGUF LLMs in ComfyUI using llama.cpp, including Qwen3-VL, Qwen3.5, Qwen3.6, Gemma 4, and gpt-oss.

custom_nodes.author: wuwukaka
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-BodyRatioMapper
custom_nodes.description: A project for pose alignment and human body proportion mapping based on SDPose.

custom_nodes.author: namemechan
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-DCW
custom_nodes.description: Near implementation of Differential Correction in Wavelet domain (DCW) for SNR-t bias correction. Based on arXiv:2604.16044 (Yu et al., 2026). No external dependencies. Compatible with SDXL, SD1.5, Flux, Cosmos, EDM, DiT. (README in Korean)

custom_nodes.author: RandyHaylor
custom_nodes.title: Claude CLI (Vision+Text)
custom_nodes.description: Call the local `claude` CLI from ComfyUI for vision+text or text-only completions. Uses your existing `claude login` OAuth (no API key required). Supports UUID session reuse for prompt-cache savings, with session token-usage tracking. Additional utility nodes: `Split Image Batch to List of Image Batches` (takes a large incoming batch and splits it into a list of smaller sub-batches with start/end index outputs, so you can send N images at a time — e.g. pairs — to the Claude CLI node along with their original batch indices for tracking), `Indexed 2x2 Grid from Batch`, `Select Images (Bounds Safe)`, and `Image Batch Current Index`. Optional headless API-key mode.

custom_nodes.author: oath-studio
custom_nodes.title: comfy-vllm
custom_nodes.description: https://www.theoath.studio/projects/comfy-vllm-node Generates Stable Diffusion prompts using a locally running vLLM server. Supports {wild|card} expansion, a prefix field for quality tags, auto model detection via /v1/models, live preview on the node face, and configurable retry logic. No API keys or internet connection required. Wire the single output directly into CLIPTextEncode.

custom_nodes.author: oath-studio
custom_nodes.title: comfy-lora-iterator
custom_nodes.description: https://www.theoath.studio/projects/comfy-lora-iterator A ComfyUI node that automatically steps through every LoRA in a directory on each generation run. Increment, decrement, randomize, or hold fixed. No rewiring. No manual switching. Queue and walk away.

custom_nodes.author: Your Name
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-plugins
custom_nodes.description: Starter scaffold for developing ComfyUI custom nodes.

custom_nodes.author: bnwa
custom_nodes.title: Comfy Combos
custom_nodes.description: Dropdown selectors for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: SOLRICKS
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-SOLRICKS
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI Video Anti-Aliasing Pack

custom_nodes.author: machinepainting
custom_nodes.title: MachinePainting Nodes
custom_nodes.description: Professional photo editing tools for ComfyUI. Photoshop-style curves, levels, and color adjustments, AI-powered masking / background removal, LUT color grading, advanced channel masking, color management, frequency separation, blur and noise/grain filters, inpaint mask tools, and workflow utility nodes.

custom_nodes.author: bemoregt
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_AdversarialAttack
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node set that generates adversarial examples using a pretrained ResNet18 classifier.

custom_nodes.author: bemoregt
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_FFTNet
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node for FFTNet language model inference using efficient FFT-based global token mixing as an alternative to self-attention. (Description by CC)

custom_nodes.author: polly-creative
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_Polly_Nodes
custom_nodes.description: A collection of high-quality texture utility nodes for technical artists and environment designers with precision masking and color extraction for emissive materials.

custom_nodes.author: throttlekitty
custom_nodes.title: tkNodes
custom_nodes.description: This node allows you to loop through specified layers in the LTX 2.3 model to potentially improve output quality with an eye toward artifacts in high motion.

custom_nodes.author: karcsiha
custom_nodes.title: comfyUi-deflicker
custom_nodes.description: ComfyUI custom node for removing brightness flicker and chunk boundary artifacts in AI-generated video sequences (WAN, VACE, FramePack, etc.).

custom_nodes.author: Experience-Monks
custom_nodes.title: Monks-Prompt-Enhancer-ComfyUI-Node
custom_nodes.description: A ComfyUI custom node that uses the Gemini API to rewrite a raw prompt into one optimised for a specific image generation model and workflow.

custom_nodes.author: Mervent
custom_nodes.title: comfyui-model-randomizer
custom_nodes.description: A custom node for ComfyUI that randomly selects a checkpoint from a configurable list of models with weighted selection, per-model CFG ranges, and enable/disable toggles.

custom_nodes.author: Moeblack
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-AnimaTool
custom_nodes.description: AI Tool Use API for Anima anime/illustration image generation. Supports MCP Server (native image display in Cursor/Claude), HTTP API, and CLI.

custom_nodes.author: andreszs
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-OpenPose-Studio
custom_nodes.description: Modern OpenPose pose editor for ComfyUI with collections, JSON import/export, background image support, and compatibility with legacy pose JSON.

custom_nodes.author: andreszs
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Ultralytics-Studio
custom_nodes.description: Ultralytics workflow and editor tools for ComfyUI with enhanced preview and UI integration.

custom_nodes.author: andreszs
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Styler-Pipeline
custom_nodes.description: Style selection and AI-assisted preset pipeline for ComfyUI, including manual and LLM-based style workflows.

custom_nodes.author: SiliconFlow
custom_nodes.title: BizyAirPlus
custom_nodes.description: [a/BizyAirPlus](https://github.com/siliconflow/BizyAirPlus) Run your workflow on cloud.

custom_nodes.author: thomaskippster
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI Model Downloader Bridge
custom_nodes.description: Bridge for the standalone ComfyUI Model Downloader. Analyzes workflows, finds missing models via AI, and manages your archive to save SSD space.

custom_nodes.author: akashzeno
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-PulseOfMotion
custom_nodes.description: Predicts Physical FPS (PhyFPS) from video using the Visual Chronometer model from the Pulse of Motion paper. Includes SDPA-optimized attention, device selection, progress tracking, and auto-downloads the model from HuggingFace.

custom_nodes.author: ketle-man
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Workflow-Studio
custom_nodes.description: Workflow management and generation UI plugin. Browse, organize, and execute workflows with auto-generated parameter editing, AI prompt assistant (Ollama), JSON syntax highlighting, Eagle integration, and multi-language support (EN/JA/ZH).

custom_nodes.author: destinyfaux
custom_nodes.title: Z-FUSE: Surgical LoRA Orchestrator
custom_nodes.description: High-fidelity, architecture-aware LoRA fusion for Z-Image (S3-DiT). Features simultaneous TIES-merging, per-block tuning, and no-loss export.

custom_nodes.author: Amatsukast
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-SBTools
custom_nodes.description: Workflow toolkit for ComfyUI. Includes BiRefNet background removal, dynamic prompt/image variable system for batch generation, chroma key tools, and more utilities.

custom_nodes.author: kenyonxu
custom_nodes.title: Kai Civitai LoRA Loader
custom_nodes.description: A LoRA loader that fetches and displays Civitai metadata including trigger words and preview images, with local caching and NSFW blur support.

custom_nodes.author: pixaroma
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-Pixaroma
custom_nodes.description: Creative suite for ComfyUI with 3D Builder, AudioReact, Image Composer, Paint Studio, Save Mp4, Image Crop, Image Compare, Note Pixaroma, Label, Resolution, Preview Image, and Align Pixaroma (canvas snap & alignment guides). Layers, transforms, AI background removal, audio-reactive video, and more.

custom_nodes.author: Motif Technologies
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-MotifVideo2B
custom_nodes.description: Custom nodes for Motif-Video 2B (Motif Technologies) text-to-video and image-to-video diffusion model. Includes model loaders, samplers, and a workflow-driven automatic model download dialog.

custom_nodes.author: chkeeho80
custom_nodes.title: PromptDeckComposer
custom_nodes.description: Structured + chaos-based prompt generation system for ComfyUI. Generate less. Evolve more.

custom_nodes.author: AISeDam
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI_RP_Cast
custom_nodes.description: Per-region prompt and LoRA control for SD1.5, SDXL, Z-Image, and Qwen — compatible with multiple model architectures.

custom_nodes.author: stevelasmin4real
custom_nodes.title: Resolution Calculator by Steve Lasmin
custom_nodes.description: Calculates width and height from max resolution, aspect ratio, and multiplier for ComfyUI

custom_nodes.author: hm1579
custom_nodes.title: ComfyUI-LoopGif
custom_nodes.description: A simple ComfyUI custom node for creating looping GIFs from VIDEO inputs.

custom_nodes.author: stevelasmin4real
custom_nodes.title: Universal Input Hub by Steve Lasmin
custom_nodes.description: All-in-one ComfyUI workflow hub: resolution calculator, noise, sigmas, conditioning, and sampler outputs
